title: Production deploy (web + versioned print bundle with visible version+date) + disclaimer/branding terms
context: With M1 content and M2 electrical content complete and WCAG 2.2 AA and i18n in place, the kit is ready for production deployment. The hosting target is selected in arch-001 (GitHub Pages / Netlify / Cloudflare Pages — static, no app server). The print bundle must carry a visible version number and date on every page so stale paper copies are identifiable. Branding and disclaimer terms must be documented: no 'Repair Café' name or logo; 'community repair event' generic term; 'not an official or affiliated product unless named endorsement received'; attribution per CC-BY-4.0.
objective: Deploy the production build to the static hosting target selected in arch-001, publish a versioned print bundle with visible version+date, and document the disclaimer and branding terms in the site and in a committed policy document.
acceptanceCriteria: The production web build is deployed to the static hosting target selected in arch-001; the deployment is automated from the main branch via CI
The versioned print bundle is published with a clearly visible version number and date on every page; the bundle is downloadable from the production site

Disclaimer and branding terms are documented in the site (footer or dedicated page) and in a committed policy document: no 'Repair Café' name/logo; generic 'community repair event' term; 'this kit is not an official or affiliated product unless a named endorsement is on file'; attribution requirements per CC-BY-4.0
The production site passes the CI no-telemetry/PII audit (static + runtime E2E), WCAG 2.2 AA automated checks, and print-smoke test
The deployment configuration contains no secrets, API keys, or tokens in committed files; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass
output: A merged PR configuring production deployment to static hosting with automated CI deploy, a versioned print bundle with visible version+date, and committed disclaimer/branding policy terms.
